== Notes for [[Item:Q88351|Q88351]] ==

[http://www.geni.com/people/Arrhabaeus-I/6000000006503673006 Arrhabaeus I, King of Lynkestis] was also connected to her as a father since her name states Archalaeus as being the father have disconnected her from him

SOURCE NOTES:
http://www.american-pictures.com/genealogy/persons/per04488.htm#0

RESEARCH NOTES:
Princess of Macedonia

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
